components.label: Developer
components.summary: Engineer who ships code via PRs. Pushes branches, opens PRs, merges after CI passes.

components.label: Visitor
components.summary: Anonymous reader who picks a category and clicks Generate to read a random quote.

components.label: Admin
components.summary: Signed-in operator managing the quote library. Holds an admin_session cookie.

components.label: proxy.js
components.summary: Edge auth gate. Runs before any rendering on /admin/* — checks the admin_session cookie, redirects to /login if missing.

components.label: / (Home)
components.summary: Renders the landing page. Fetches DISTINCT categories from Postgres and hands them to QuoteGenerator.

components.label: QuoteGenerator
components.summary: Browser-side UI. Tracks active category, fetches /api/random-quote on click, fades in the result.

components.label: /login
components.summary: Password form. Server Action verifies ADMIN_PASSWORD and sets the httpOnly admin_session cookie.

components.label: /logout
components.summary: Deletes the admin_session cookie and 303-redirects to /. POST-only so Link prefetch can't trigger it.

components.label: /admin
components.summary: Quote list view. requireAdmin() gate, lists all quotes, hosts the deleteQuote Server Action.

components.label: /admin/add
components.summary: Add-quote form. Server Action validates text+category, inserts via Prisma, revalidates / and /admin.

components.label: /admin/edit/[id]
components.summary: Edit-quote form. Loads the existing quote, Server Action updates it, revalidates / and /admin.

components.label: /api/random-quote
components.summary: Returns one random quote. Counts matching rows, picks a random OFFSET, optionally excludes the previous id.

components.label: Prisma client
components.summary: Shared PrismaClient wired to Neon via @prisma/adapter-neon. Cached on globalThis in dev to survive HMR.

components.label: Neon Postgres
components.summary: Hosted Postgres. Single Quote table (id, text, author?, source?, category, timestamps). Hibernates when idle.

components.label: GitHub repo
components.summary: Hosts the code and enforces branch protection on main. Direct pushes blocked; PRs require green CI.

components.label: GitHub Actions
components.summary: Runs npm ci, npm run lint, npm run build on every PR and on push to main. Green check is required to merge.

components.label: Vercel
components.summary: Builds and deploys atomically on every push to main. Serves the edge proxy and the Next.js app.
